zh.lifeSummary: 當Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I於1121年出生在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾時，他的父親King Madog of Powys30歲，母親Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales26歲。他和Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd至少有3個兒子。他於1159年住在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾波維斯 卡素。他去世於1191年在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾蒙哥馬利享年70歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙格莫利夏爾梅福德。

nameMeanings.name: Madog
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Madore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Eusebe, Fernand, Lucien, Normand, Adhemar, Adrien, Donat, Elzear, Francois, Gaetan, Gilles.
French Canadian: from a French shortened form of the Spanish personal name Amador, from Latin Amator (from amator ‘lover’), a Christian saint's name. Compare Mador .
In some cases possibly also Breton (Madoré): nickname meaning literally ‘good help’, from Old Breton mat ‘good’ and uuoret ‘help’.

nameMeanings.name: Gruffydd
meanings: Welsh: The Welsh name; from creffydd, strong faith, or strong in faith. Gruffydd, a Welsh form of Gryffydd.

nameMeanings.name: Maelor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Name devised during the Communist era, from the initial letters of the words Marx, Engels, Lenin, October, Revolution.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

en.lifeSummary: When Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I was born in 1121, in Montgomeryshire, Wales, his father, King Madog of Powys, was 30 and his mother, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, was 26. He had at least 3 sons with Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd. He lived in Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales in 1159. He died in 1191, in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales, at the age of 70, and was buried in Meifod, Montgomeryshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I est né en 1121, à Montgomeryshire, Galles, son père, King Madog of Powys, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils avec Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd. Il a vécu à Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles en 1159. Il est décédé en 1191, à Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Meifod, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

de.Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I 1121 in Montgomeryshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Madog of Powys 30 und seine Mutter Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales 26. Er hatte mit Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd mindestens 3 Söhne. 1159 hat er in Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales gelebt. Er starb 1191 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Wales und wurde in Meifod, Montgomeryshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I è nato il nel 1121 nel Montgomeryshire, Galles, il suo padre, King Madog of Powys, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli con Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd. Vissuto a Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Galles nel 1159. Morì nel 1191, nel Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Galles, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Meifod, Montgomeryshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog Iが1121年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアで生まれた時，父King Madog of Powysは30歳，母Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Walesは26歳であった。彼はAngharad ferch Owain Gwyneddとの間に少なくとも3人の息子をもうけた。彼は1159年にはウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアポウィス カストルに住んでいた。彼は1191年にウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアモントゴメリーで70歳で死去し，ウェールズモントゴメリシュアイアメイフォドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I(이)가 1121년 웨일스 몽고머이실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Madog of Powys(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 1159년도에 웨일스 몽고머이실르 파위스 카스틀에서 살았다. 그는 1191년 웨일스 몽고머이실르 몽고메리에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몽고머이실르 이포드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I nasceu em 1121, em Montgomeryshire, Gales, seu pai, King Madog of Powys, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos com Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd. Ele viveu em Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Gales em 1159. Ele faleceu em 1191, em Montgomery, Montgomeryshire, Gales, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Meifod, Montgomeryshire, Gales.

ro.Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Wales: Powis Castle, Montgomeryshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gruffydd Maelor ap Madog I родился в 1121 г. в местности монтгомиришир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени King Madog of Powys было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Verch Gruffydd Princess of Wales, 26. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына от Angharad ferch Owain Gwynedd. Он жил в местности поуис кастл, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в 1159 году. Он умер в 1191 г. в местности монтгомири, монтгомиришир, Уэльс в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности мифод, монтгомиришир, Уэльс.
